Reviews.Author: 26u9avvo35
Reviews.Comment: This cheat is overall good, I’d rather take another external over this but it’s definitely solid and not bad.

Categories.Comment: Aimbot is good, it’s what’d you’d expect, decently customizable.
Not a fan of the visuals, just like a regular cheat, looks a little clunky imo.
This is personal preference, but the menu is eyesoring. I hate looking at it, the widgets are annoying, it’s just not made for everyone.
Good uptime and stability. Decent optimizations but it experiences crashes.
Run of the mill features, nothing id call special. Stuff like speed, fly, etc.

Reviews.Comment: i would recommend buying another one for maybe 1 or 2 buck more than buying this plus the dev dont really care about the project anymore
